fey-wanderer.name: Fey Wanderer
fey-wanderer.desc: A ranger touched by the Feywild — charming, fey-stepping, and dealing psychic dread.

ref.title: Otherworldly Glamour
body: You add your Wisdom modifier to any Charisma check you make, and you gain proficiency in one Charisma skill (Persuasion).

ref.title: Dreadful Strikes
body: Once per turn when you hit a creature with a weapon, you can deal an extra 1d4 psychic damage (1d6 at level 11).

hitRiders.label: Dreadful Strikes
hitRiders.note: psychic · once per turn, no action

ref.title: Fey Wanderer Spells
body: You always have Charm Person prepared; more Fey spells are added as you level (Misty Step at 5, Dimension Door at 9, etc.).

battle-master.name: Battle Master
battle-master.desc: A fighter who spends superiority dice on tactical combat maneuvers.

grantsPool.label: Superiority Dice
grantsPool.reminder: Spend a superiority die — roll 1d8 for the maneuver.

ref.title: Combat Superiority
body: You have four d8 superiority dice that fuel maneuvers; regain them on a short or long rest. Your maneuver save DC = 8 + Proficiency Bonus + Strength or Dexterity modifier.

ref.title: Student of War
body: You gain proficiency with one type of Artisan's Tools (Smith's Tools) and one skill from the Fighter list (Insight).

ref.title: Maneuvers
body: You learn three maneuvers (Trip Attack, Goading Attack, Precision Attack, Riposte, etc.), fueled by superiority dice. Record your chosen maneuvers.

hitRiders.label: Trip Attack
hitRiders.note: Str save DC {dc} or knocked Prone

hitRiders.label: Goading Attack
hitRiders.note: Wis save DC {dc} or Disadv. attacking others

hitRiders.label: Precision Attack
hitRiders.note: add to the attack roll instead

diviner.name: Diviner
diviner.desc: A wizard who glimpses the future and replaces rolls with foretold Portent dice.

grantsPool.label: Portent Dice
grantsPool.reminder: Portent: replace any d20 (yours or a creature you can see) with a recorded Portent roll.

ref.title: Portent
body: After a long rest, roll two d20s and record them. You can replace any attack roll, saving throw, or ability check (yours or a creature you can see) with one of these foretold rolls, before the roll is made.

ref.title: Divination Savant
body: Copying a Divination spell into your spellbook costs half the usual time and gold, and Divination spells are easier for you to learn.

life.name: Life Domain
life.desc: A cleric of the Life domain — the premier healer, bolstering allies' hit points.

alwaysPrepared.name: Lesser Restoration
alwaysPrepared.sub: end a disease or a condition

ref.title: Life Domain Spells
body: Bless, Cure Wounds, Aid, and Lesser Restoration are always prepared and don't count against your prepared total.

ref.title: Disciple of Life
body: Whenever a spell slot of 1st level or higher restores hit points to a creature, that creature regains extra hit points equal to 2 + the slot's level.

ref.title: Preserve Life
body: As a Magic action, spend a use of Channel Divinity to restore hit points equal to five times your cleric level, divided among creatures within 30 ft. It can't raise a creature above half its hit point maximum.
